sql.query: SELECT u.id,u.displayName,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS openTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status='in_progress' THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS inProgressCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS overdueCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS dueSoonCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.completedDate>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedLast30 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=utr.userId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.assignedToUserId=u.id AND t.tenantId=utr.tenantId WHERE utr.tenantId=:tenantId AND utr.isActive=1 GROUP BY u.id,u.displayName ORDER BY openTaskCount DESC,u.displayName

SELECT tm.id,tm.teamName,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS openTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status='in_progress' THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS inProgressCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS overdueCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS dueSoonCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.completedDate>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedLast30 FROM tbl_teams tm LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.assignedToTeamId=tm.id AND t.tenantId=tm.tenantId WHERE tm.tenantId=:tenantId AND tm.isActive=1 GROUP BY tm.id,tm.teamName ORDER BY openTaskCount DESC,tm.teamName
